blockingIssues.description: Admin user create/update does not validate that `userGroup` exists before write, so invalid IDs trigger unhandled foreign-key exceptions and 500 responses instead of controlled validation errors.
Admin user delete allows removing the last group-1 admin account, breaking the same admin-presence invariant already enforced in user update demotion logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add regression tests for invalid non-existent `userGroup` values on create/update and for last-admin deletion protection to prevent recurrence of these integrity defects.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current suite includes last-admin demotion coverage but no coverage for delete-last-admin or invalid-group 500 paths.
